tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "CompromisedHost"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 0
set name "block-icmp-compromised-to-wan"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set srcaddr "CompromisedHost"
set dstaddr "all"
set action deny
set schedule "always"
set service "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
end
"}
